title: Isekai Yarisaa
synopsis: A gang of hooligans sprayed flammable gas in the apartment. The Taka leader lit a cigarette and went to heaven with his friends after the explosion. Fortunately, they didn't die, but were reborn in another world full of adventurism. On their way, the gang met a company of a female warrior, the elf Kirie, the priestess Elena and the girl magician Sonya, who were returning to the tavern where their lovers were waiting for them. But Taki already has a plan, and the bullies won't let the girls go that easily. After all, the only thing he and his friends were good at in their previous lives was tricking and tricking women into having sex.
